visa_type_detail.name: Spouses and partners of General Employment Permit and Intra-Corporate Transferee Irish Employment Permit holders
visa_type_detail.condition: Eligible spouses and partners will be registered on a Stamp 1G permission, allowing them to take up employment without a separate Employment Permit.

visa_type_detail.name: General Family Dependent
visa_type_detail.condition: Non-EEA national dependent on a family member currently resident in Ireland. Sponsor must be an Irish national, married to an Irish national, or a holder of Stamp 1, 4, or 5 Irish Residence permission and resident for the applicable period. Sponsor must be able to support dependents without public funds.

data.processing_time: Currently experiencing very high volumes of family dependent applications, resulting in delays in processing post/applications. Applicants will receive an acknowledgement when applications are received and uploaded.
reference_urls: Attention eligible spouses and partners of General Employment Permit and Intra-Corporate Transferee Irish Employment Permit holders – Immigration Service Delivery (irishimmigration.ie)

essential_apps.description: Digital identity for accessing public services in Ireland.
Health information and services from the Health Service Executive (HSE).
Journey planner and real-time public transport information across Ireland.
International money transfer and digital banking.
Mobile banking with an international focus.
